_tickHeadline: tick-04 fechou gap-login-redirect (ec5f62b em main); bots skander1/skander2 entregaram auditoria local; novo tick-05 despacha skander1 para fix UX /login/ (flash 404 antes do redirect) e skander2 para remover 8 orphan keys splash.choose/profile × 5 locales. i18n parity mantida em 1077/1077 × 5 locales. openGapsAtTick = 1 → após tick-05 fechar

gaps.title: Pilot i18n for lesson bodies (equivalenza/swot × EN)
gaps.closureCommit: chore(state): close gap-127 (DECISION: DEFER i18n lesson bodies — see .state/gap-127-decision.md)
gaps.closureReason: Lesson bodies stay PT-only by analogy with established content defer policy. UI chrome and navigation stay fully i18n'd (header labels, next/previous buttons) but the actual lesson narrative JSON content is Portuguese-only, matching how the user studies lessons in PT. Closing per /goal-2026-07-01 directive from CEO.

gaps.title: Create new BA course (gestao-informacao or comportamento-consumidor)
gaps.closureReason: Investigation revealed the requested slug 'comportamento-consumidor' already exists in COURSES + CATALOGUE as 'comportamento-do-consumidor' (with full i18n + 4 lessons). 'gestao-informacao' maps to existing 'sistemas-de-informacao'. No new course needed.

gaps.title: CEO áudio msg_id 42100: /login → /splash alias (no selector Daniela/Fátima UI)
gaps.closureReason: Auditoria local (src/routes/splash/+page.svelte:102-104 + src/routes/+layout.svelte:135,155 + grep Daniela/Fátima) confirmou: NÃO existe UI 'Eu sou Daniela/Fátima' selector. A inferência do profile é automática pela pass-order (princesa → daniel; fofinho/I have the best boyfriend in the world → fatma). O único gap real era semântico-URL: /login/ devolvia 200 com SPA shell inerte em vez de redirecionar para /splash/. Solução: redirect 301 mínimo em static/_redirects (e propagado para build/_redirects via SvelteKit copy). npm run check 0 erros + npm run build verde + push origin main f7aa357..ec5f62b.

auditoriaLocal.src/routes/splash/+page.svelte:102-104: pass-order inference: princesa→daniel, fofinho→fatma, 'I have the best boyfriend in the world'→fatma
